title: [retired · voice audit 2026-04-18]
body:
This block originally described a 5am tide-pool visit at El Segundo Beach in first-person Mike voice. Mike did not actually visit those tide pools at that time, and there is no Mike source to cite. Per VOICE.md (added 2026-04-18) this block is retired (draft=true) so the ID is preserved but the content stops being served.

Replacement candidate (cc voice + factual): a future block on actual El Segundo low-tide windows would need either (a) Mike's own observation with a source, or (b) a clearly cc-voice editorial about the geology of the rocks at the Vista Del Mar crossing. Both are valid; this draft was neither.
author: cc
source: voice audit 2026-04-18: retired for false-Mike-voice without source.
